repair_strategy.problem_summary: The ensures clause used mixed logical operators without parentheses.

problem_details.what: The ensures clause combined && and || in a long expression.
problem_details.why: Dafny requires explicit parentheses to avoid logical precedence ambiguity.
problem_details.how: Rewrite the ensures clause into two explicit cases (signed integer / unsigned integer) and fully parenthesize the expression.
